name: BR XL Lamper with Lid White with Daydream Green Handles - Brightroom™
description:
Make laundry days as easy as can be with the help of this XL Lamper with Lid and Handles from Brightroom™. Designed in a deep rectangular silhouette, this laundry hamper features a lid with a wide cutout for added convenience. Great for sorting clothes, this two-in-one laundry basket and hamper features a mesh design for ventilation, while the handles on the top make it easy to carry and move around. Best of all, the white hue with green handles adds a sweet pop of color.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
